sourceRefs.summary: Supplementary Table S3; stage-resolved de novo H3K4me3 peak tables with DSB hotspot Yes/No annotations.
Supplementary Table S6; mid-zygotene de novo H3K4me3 peaks annotated for H3K36me3, H3K27ac, and H3K9me2 dip.
Paper text reporting stage-specific PRDM9-mediated H3K4me3 peak counts and hotspot-associated counts.
Paper methods for ChIP-seq peak calling, hotspot-associated H3K4me3 classification, and statistical tests.

notebookRefs.summary: Bounded first-pass audit of local supplementary tables; no GEO raw or processed sequencing data were downloaded.

environmentRefs.summary: Used Python standard-library zipfile and ElementTree to read xlsx workbook XML because openpyxl was not installed.

cells.purpose: Parse each Supplementary Table S3 worksheet, locate the DSB hotspots column, count de novo H3K4me3 rows, DSB-hotspot Yes/No rows, and simple peak-width summaries.

codeRef.summary: Standard-library xlsx XML parser used in this worker pass; logic finds the header row containing DSB hotspots and counts non-empty genomic rows.

outputRefs.summary: Leptotene 3358 peaks / 2773 DSB-hotspot Yes; early-zygotene 13490 / 9440; mid-zygotene 16540 / 10137; late-zygotene 8880 / 7681; early 1-pachytene 8187 / 7375.

diagnostics: The row counts reproduce the stage-specific peak counts and hotspot-associated counts reported in the paper text for the five locally available Table S3 worksheets.
This cell does not recalculate peaks from ChIP-seq reads, does not test PRDM9 affinity-seq overlap, and does not infer CO/NCO fate.

cells.purpose: Parse Supplementary Table S6 to count mid-zygotene de novo H3K4me3 peaks annotated with newly generated H3K36me3, newly generated H3K27ac, or H3K9me2 dip.

codeRef.summary: Standard-library xlsx XML parser used in this worker pass; logic finds the histone-mark annotation columns and counts Yes values.

outputRefs.summary: Table S6 contains 16540 mid-zygotene de novo H3K4me3 rows; 1561 H3K36me3 Yes, 3403 H3K27ac Yes, and 1012 H3K9me2 dip Yes.

diagnostics: This verifies the local table is aligned with the mid-zygotene de novo H3K4me3 universe but does not reproduce Fig. 4/5 signal profiles or accessibility statistics.

cells.purpose: Assess whether the current local evidence establishes a scientific contradiction for PRDM9-mediated DSB fate.

outputRefs.summary: No contradiction is established; the core fate claim remains limited by missing PRDM9 affinity overlap, NOMe accessibility calculations, direct CO/NCO outcome data, and original source code.

diagnostics: The correct current conclusion is partial table-level reproduction plus insufficient evidence for DSB fate causality, not not-reproduced or contradicted.

notes: This analysis-notebook fixture is intentionally refs-first and bounded; it records computed summaries from local supplements without embedding raw table rows.
